DISCOVERY 302, 1 - DEFENDANT DEMAS YAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY. THE COURT SPECIALLY SETS THE MATTER TO BE HEARD BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD ON 1/29/26 AT 1:30PM IN DEPT.302. VISITING JUDGE: CINDEE MAYFIELD, NOT REPORTED. (302/CM)

DISCOVERY, 302, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY ADVANCED FROM JAN-29-2026 TO DISCOVERY AT JAN-26-2026 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 302 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO BE HEARD BEFORE VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR AUG-31-2026 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JAN-28-2026 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISCOVERY 302, 1 - DEFENDANT'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO SET ONE FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL PROVIDE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION TO DEFENDANT'S SET ONE FORM INTERROGATORIES NO LATER THAN 30 DAYS AFTER SERVICE OF THE ORDER GRANTING THE MOTION. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR AN AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS IN AN UNSPECIFIED AMOUNT IS DENIED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX. VISITING JUDGE: CINDEE MAYFIELD, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/CM)

DISCOVERY 302,2 - DEFENDANT'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING PLAINTIFF TO ATTEND AND TESTIFY AT DEPOSITION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO RENEW. DEFENDANT'S MOVING PAPERS FAIL TO INCLUDE A PROOF OF SERVICE DEMONSTRATING THAT PLAINTIFF WAS ELECTRONICALLY SERVED WITH THE NOTICE OF DEPOSITION IN A TIMELY MANNER. (CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 2025.240(A)) ADDITIONALLY, THE MOTION IS DEFICIENT BECAUSE IT IS NOT "ACCOMPANIED BY A MEET AND CONFER DECLARATION UNDER SECTION 2016.040, OR, WHEN THE DEPONENT FAILS TO ATTEND THE DEPOSITION AND PRODUCE THE DOCUMENTS DESCRIBED IN THE DEPOSITION NOTICE, BY A DECLARATION STATING THAT THE PETITIONER HAS CONTACTED THE DEPONENT TO INQUIRE ABOUT THE NONAPPEARANCE." COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX. VISITING JUDGE: CINDEE MAYFIELD, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/CM)

Off Calendar Dec-24-2025 Advanced From Jan-29-26 To Jan-26-26 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DEMAS YAN Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff Chunlei Liu To Attend And Testify At Deposition

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2026 Set For Trial On Aug-31-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery
Off Calendar Jan-26-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Ms. Chunlei Liu appeared prior to Open Court. The clerk informs Ms. Liu the court did not receive any notice to contest, the party did not follow the tentative ruling rule, there is no appearance by the other side, therefore the TR ruling becomes the final ruling of the Court.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - Defendant's unopposed Motion to Compel Responses to Set One Form Interrogatories is granted. Plaintiff shall provide verified responses without objection to Defendant's Set One Form Interrogatories no later than 30 days after service of the order granting the motion. Defendant's request for an award of monetary sanctions in an unspecified amount is denied.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Visiting Judge: Cindee Mayfield, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/CM)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff Chunlei Liu To Attend And Testify At Deposition
Off Calendar Jan-26-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Ms. Chunlei Liu appeared prior to Open Court. The clerk informs Ms. Liu the court did not receive any notice to contest, the party did not follow the tentative ruling rule, there is no appearance by the other side, therefore the TR ruling becomes the final ruling of the Court.

No appearances in Open court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - Defendant's unopposed Motion for Order Compelling Plaintiff to Attend and Testify at Deposition is denied without prejudice to renew. Defendant's moving papers fail to include a proof of service demonstrating that Plaintiff was electronically served with the Notice of Deposition in a timely manner. (Code of Civil Procedure 2025.240(a)) Additionally, the motion is deficient because it is not "accompanied by a meet and confer declaration under Section 2016.040, or, when the deponent fails to attend the deposition and produce the documents described in the deposition notice, by a declaration stating that the petitioner has contacted the deponent to inquire about the nonappearance."

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Visiting Judge: Cindee Mayfield, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/CM)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery
Off Calendar Dec-23-2025 Continued To Jan-29-26 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

The court received a notice to contest the matter.

No Hearing held today due to Power Outage. The Court rules as follows:

1 - DEFENDANT DEMAS YAN's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery.

The Court specially sets the matter to be heard by Visiting Judge Cindee Mayfield on 1/29/26 at 1:30pm in Dept.302.

Visiting Judge: Cindee Mayfield, Not Reported. (302/CM)
